RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0001 Page 4 of 4 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 18/02/2025 UTILITY BILL - 957 6,550 06/11/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 6,550 08/08/2025 UTILITY BILL 304 1,996 8,242 10/12/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 77 394 8,559 03/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 61 - 8,498 22/04/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 8,498 09/05/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY - 1,151 9,649 11/06/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 210 2,373 11,812 16/08/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 444 12,256 23/11/2025 UTILITY BILL 358 - 11,898 12/07/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 143 668 12,423 04/07/2025 UTILITY BILL - 1,918 14,341 24/04/2025 UTILITY BILL 619 - 13,722 14/11/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 499 1,197 14,420 14/03/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - - 14,420 14/05/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 14,420 14/01/2025 UTILITY BILL 678 275 14,017 01/02/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 581 - 13,436 DTI exception
